MULTIPLAYERCARD-FRIEND_FEE_POWER.title: Friend Fee
MULTIPLAYERCARD-FRIEND_FEE_POWER.descrip: After combat, this modifies the current combat Gold reward in one unified settlement.
MULTIPLAYERCARD-FRIEND_FEE_POWER.smartDe: After combat, this modifies the current combat Gold reward in one unified settlement.
MULTIPLAYERCARD-FRIEND_FEE_PLUS_POWER.de: After combat, this modifies the current combat Gold reward in one unified settlement. This version uses 50% loss and triple payout.
MULTIPLAYERCARD-FRIEND_FEE_PLUS_POWER.sm: After combat, this modifies the current combat Gold reward in one unified settlement. This version uses 50% loss and triple payout.
